routines.name: Alignment Foundation
routines.goal: Build hip control and knee tracking.
routines.goalEs: Mejorar control de cadera y seguimiento de rodilla.

exercises.name: Side-lying clamshell
exercises.cue: Keep pelvis stacked, knee opens without rolling back.
exercises.cueEs: Mantener pelvis alineada, abrir rodilla sin rodar atras.

exercises.name: Mini-band lateral walk
exercises.cue: Soft knees, toes forward, feel glute med.
exercises.cueEs: Rodillas suaves, puntas al frente, sentir gluteo medio.

exercises.name: Stride Control
exercises.goal: Improve knee tracking during dynamic steps.
exercises.goalEs: Mejorar tracking de rodilla en pasos dinamicos.

exercises.name: Lateral step-down
exercises.cue: Hip stays level, knee follows toes.
exercises.cueEs: Cadera nivelada, rodilla sigue los dedos.

exercises.name: Single-leg box tap
exercises.nameEs: Toque de caja a una pierna

exercises.name: Strength Builder
exercises.goalEs: Tolerancia a carga con buena alineacion.

exercises.name: Goblet squat with band
exercises.cueEs: La banda guia las rodillas hacia afuera.

routines.name: Strength + Stability
routines.nameEs: If pain spikes, reduce range and focus on quality.
Use mirrors or video to check alignment.
Warm up calves and hips before runs.
routines.goal: Single-leg control, hip strength, foot tripod.
routines.goalEs: Control unipodal, fuerza de cadera y pie estable.
exercises: Si el dolor sube, reducir rango y priorizar calidad.
Usa espejo o video para revisar alineacion.
Calienta pantorrillas y caderas antes de correr.
exercises.name: Split squat (short stride)
exercises.cue: Front knee tracks over middle toes.

exercises.name: Step-down to tap
exercises.cue: Keep knee aligned, avoid collapse inward.
exercises.cueEs: Alinear rodilla, evitar colapso hacia adentro.

routines.name: Mobility Reset
routines.goal: Open hips, release calves, restore ankle range.
routines.goalEs: Abrir caderas, liberar pantorrillas y tobillos.

exercises.name: Adductor rockback
exercises.cue: Keep spine long and chest open.

cues: Tripod foot: big toe, little toe, heel grounded.
Imagine pushing the knee slightly out over the middle toes.
Glute med stays on: light tension in outer hip.
Slow reps and full control before adding load.
If pain spikes, reduce range and focus on quality.
cuesEs: Pie tripode: dedo gordo, dedo pequeno y talon apoyados.
Imaginar rodilla hacia afuera sobre los dedos medios.
Gluteo medio activo: tension ligera en cadera externa.
Repeticiones lentas y control total antes de cargar.
Si el dolor sube, reducir rango y priorizar calidad.
